nasb.text: They spoke of the God of Jerusalem as of the gods of the peoples of the earth, the work of men’s hands.

esv.text: And they spoke of the God of Jerusalem as they spoke of the gods of the peoples of the earth, which are the work of men’s hands.

cnv.text: 他們論到耶路撒冷的　神，就好像世上萬民的神一樣，把他當作是人手所做的。

ccb.text: 他把耶路撒冷的上帝与世间人手所造的神像相提并论。
